hooks.command: /bin/sh -lc 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/compact_continuity.py" ]; then exec /usr/bin/python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/compact_continuity.py" PreCompact; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; echo "KRN compact_continuity.py not found" >&2; exit 1'

/bin/sh -lc 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/compact_continuity.py" ]; then exec /usr/bin/python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/compact_continuity.py" PostCompact; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; echo "KRN compact_continuity.py not found" >&2; exit 1'
